# Earning Points

Acme Shop's Acme Rewards program allows customers to earn points on eligible purchases, accruing 1 reward point for every dollar spent, excluding gift cards, taxes, and shipping fees. Points are credited within 24 hours and are valid for 12 months from their credit date. Customers can enhance their points accumulation by participating in promotional events and referring friends, earning 50 bonus points for each referral that makes a purchase. However, points cannot be redeemed for cash and will be deducted in case of returns.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#earning-points]
